Tests the conversion of a number to a string using the String constructor in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `String` function in JavaScript. It converts the number `123000` to a string and verifies that the result is equal to the string `"123000"`. This test ensures that the `String` function correctly converts numeric values to their string representation. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a single test case for type conversion.
